synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20958 Important: Oracle Linux 9 tigervnc security update
description:
[1.15.0-6]
- Fix CVE-2025-62229: xorg-x11-server: Use-after-free in XPresentNotify structures creation
  Resolves: RHEL-119986

- Fix CVE-2025-62230: xorg-x11-server: Use-after-free in Xkb client resource removal
  Resolves: RHEL-120007

- Fix CVE-2025-62231: xorg-x11-server: Value overflow in Xkb extension XkbSetCompatMap()
  Resolves: RHEL-120768
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20958

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20958.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
tigervnc-1.15.0-6.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
tigervnc-icons-1.15.0-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
tigervnc-license-1.15.0-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
tigervnc-selinux-1.15.0-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
tigervnc-server-1.15.0-6.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
tigervnc-server-minimal-1.15.0-6.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
tigervnc-server-module-1.15.0-6.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
tigervnc-1.15.0-6.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
tigervnc-icons-1.15.0-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
tigervnc-license-1.15.0-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
tigervnc-selinux-1.15.0-6.el9_7.noarch.rpm
tigervnc-server-1.15.0-6.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
tigervnc-server-minimal-1.15.0-6.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
tigervnc-server-module-1.15.0-6.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/tigervnc-1.15.0-6.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-62229
CVE-2025-62230
CVE-2025-62231




Description of changes:

[1.15.0-6]
- Fix CVE-2025-62229: xorg-x11-server: Use-after-free in XPresentNotify structures creation
  Resolves: RHEL-119986

- Fix CVE-2025-62230: xorg-x11-server: Use-after-free in Xkb client resource removal
  Resolves: RHEL-120007

- Fix CVE-2025-62231: xorg-x11-server: Value overflow in Xkb extension XkbSetCompatMap()
  Resolves: RHEL-120768
